workflows.name: Mandatory reconsideration
workflows.description: Standard workflow for reviewing a benefit decision following a mandatory reconsideration request.

steps.name: Initial review
steps.description: Review the reconsideration request and original decision. Identify what is being disputed and what evidence may be needed.

steps.name: Gather evidence
steps.description: Request and collect evidence from the applicant, medical professionals, employers, or other third parties.

steps.name: Review evidence
steps.description: Review all received evidence against the relevant legal criteria and descriptors.

steps.name: Make decision
steps.description: Apply the legal test to the evidence and decide whether to uphold, revise, or overturn the original decision.

steps.name: Send outcome
steps.description: Send the decision notice to the applicant and any representative. Update payment systems if the decision changes the award.

steps.name: Case closed
steps.description: The case is complete. All actions have been taken and the outcome has been communicated.

specialStates.name: Escalated to senior reviewer
specialStates.description: The case has been referred to a senior reviewer for guidance on a complex issue. The case returns to the referring step once guidance is received.

workflows.name: Scheduled award review
workflows.description: Workflow for reviewing an existing benefit award at its scheduled review date.

steps.name: Initial review
steps.description: Review the current award and identify what evidence is needed to assess whether the award should continue, increase, or decrease.

steps.name: Gather evidence
steps.description: Request and collect up-to-date evidence about the claimant's current needs.

steps.name: Review evidence
steps.description: Compare current evidence with the original award to identify any changes in the claimant's circumstances.

steps.name: Make decision
steps.description: Decide whether to maintain, increase, reduce, or end the award based on the current evidence.

steps.name: Send outcome
steps.description: Send the review outcome to the claimant. Update payment systems if the award changes.

specialStates.name: Escalated to senior reviewer
specialStates.description: The case has been referred to a senior reviewer for guidance.
